content.title: JavaScript: New ES2026 Features Announced
content.content: The TC39 committee has officially approved several new features for ES2026, including pattern matching and records/tuples. These additions aim to make JavaScript more expressive and safer for complex data handling.

content.title: Node.js 24 Released with Native TypeScript Support
content.content: Node.js 24 ships with built-in TypeScript support, eliminating the need for ts-node or tsx in most projects. The runtime now natively understands .ts files and type annotations.

content.title: React 20 Introduces Server Actions by Default
content.content: React 20 makes server components the default, with improved data fetching and caching. The new compiler optimizations reduce bundle sizes by up to 40%.
